title: IBM India is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Junior)

jsonLd.title: IBM India is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Full Stack Developer looking for your next big career move? IBM India in Patna offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About IBM India:
IBM India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in REST APIs

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IBM India!
